changeSet.author: Oliver Lewington
changeSet.sql: CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW v_scheme_payment_totals AS SELECT p."partitionKey" AS "schemeId", COUNT(*) AS "paymentRequests", SUM((p.data->>'value')::numeric) AS total_value, '£' || to_char( SUM((p.data->>'value')::numeric/100), 'FM999,999,999,999,990.00' ) AS value FROM public.payments p WHERE p.type = 'uk.gov.defra.ffc.pay.payment.submitted' AND p."partitionKey" ~ '^[0-9]+$' AND jsonb_exists(p.data, 'schemeId') AND p."partitionKey"::bigint = (p.data->>'schemeId')::bigint GROUP BY p."partitionKey" ORDER BY p."partitionKey"::bigint;

changeSet.author: Oliver Lewington
